sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack and the Sauce Labs Bike Light to the cart, open the shopping cart, click checkout, enter first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345, continue, and then finish the order

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in to the application with provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
If a button with text 'Login' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Add the specified items to the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a div with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Add to cart' next to 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' next to 'Sauce Labs Bike Light'
Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Proceed to checkout from the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a div with text 'Your Cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Checkout'

workflow.name: On Checkout Information Page
workflow.description: Enter the required customer information for checkout.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If a div with text 'Checkout: Your Information' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input field with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'User' into the input field with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type '12345' into the input field with placeholder 'Zip/Postal Code'
Click the button with text 'Continue'

workflow.name: On Checkout Overview Page
workflow.description: Confirm the order details and finalize the purchase.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-two.html
If a div with text 'Checkout: Overview' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Finish'

workflow.name: On Order Complete Page
workflow.description: Verify that the order has been successfully placed.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-complete.html
If a div with text 'Checkout: Complete!' is visible
If a div with text 'Thank you for your order!' is visible
actions: Terminate: Order successfully placed

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, sort the products by price from low to high, add the two cheapest products to the cart, open the cart, remove one of them, and confirm exactly one item remains

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in with the provided username and password.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page - Sort
workflow.description: Sort the products by price from low to high.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If the text 'Products' is visible
If a dropdown with class 'product_sort_container' is visible
actions: Select 'Price (low to high)' from the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container'

workflow.name: On Products Page - Add Items
workflow.description: Add the two cheapest products to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If the text 'Products' is visible
If the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container' has the value 'lohi'
actions: Click the first button with text 'Add to cart'
Click the second button with text 'Add to cart'

workflow.name: On Products Page - Open Cart
workflow.description: Open the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If the text 'Products' is visible
If an element with class 'shopping_cart_badge' and text '2' is visible
actions: Click the element with class 'shopping_cart_link'

workflow.name: On Cart Page - Remove Item
workflow.description: Remove one of the items from the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If the text 'Your Cart' is visible
If at least two buttons with text 'Remove' are visible
actions: Click the first button with text 'Remove'

workflow.name: On Cart Page - Confirm One Item
workflow.description: Confirm that exactly one item remains in the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If the text 'Your Cart' is visible
If exactly one element with class 'cart_item' is visible
actions: Terminate: Exactly one item remains in the cart
workflow.end_state: Exactly one item remains in cart

state_names: On Cart Page - Confirm One Item

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login, log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!, click Logout, then go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls, click the Enable button, wait for the input field to become enabled, and type hello into it

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Enter username and password, then submit the login form.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If visible text 'Login Page' is present
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the input field with id 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the input field with id 'password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Secure Area Page
workflow.description: Confirm successful login and click the 'Logout' button.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
If visible text 'You logged into a secure area!' is present
actions: Click the button with text 'Logout'

workflow.name: After Logout / Navigate to Dynamic Controls
workflow.description: After logging out, navigate to the dynamic controls page.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If visible text 'Login Page' is present
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls

workflow.name: On Dynamic Controls Page (Initial)
workflow.description: Click the 'Enable' button to make the input field editable.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Enable' is visible
If the input field with id 'text' is disabled
actions: Click the button with text 'Enable'

workflow.name: Waiting for Input Field to Enable
workflow.description: Wait for the input field to become enabled after clicking the button.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If an element with id 'loading' is visible

workflow.name: On Dynamic Controls Page (Enabled)
workflow.description: Type 'hello' into the now-enabled input field.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If visible text 'It's enabled!' is present
If the input field with id 'text' is enabled
actions: Type 'hello' into the input field with id 'text'

workflow.name: Task Complete
workflow.description: All specified actions have been performed.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If the input field with id 'text' contains 'hello'
actions: Terminate: All steps completed.

state_names: After Logout / Navigate to Dynamic Controls
Waiting for Input Field to Enable
states_with_no_actions: Waiting for Input Field to Enable

lint_issues.state: Waiting for Input Field to Enable
lint_issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.

sentence: go to automationexercise.com, search for 'dress', add the first two products in the results to your cart, view the cart, and confirm both products are listed

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://automationexercise.com/

workflow.name: On Automation Exercise Homepage
workflow.description: Locate the search input and search for 'dress'.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com
If a text input with placeholder 'Search Product' is visible
actions: Type 'dress' into the text input with placeholder 'Search Product'
Click the button with icon 'search'

workflow.name: On Search Results Page
workflow.description: Add the first two products found to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/products
If a heading with text 'SEARCHED PRODUCTS' is visible
actions: Hover over the first product card
Click the 'Add to cart' button for the first product
Click the 'Continue Shopping' button in the modal dialog
Hover over the second product card
Click the 'Add to cart' button for the second product
Click the 'View Cart' button in the modal dialog

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Verify that both products are listed in the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/view_cart
If a heading with text 'Shopping Cart' is visible
actions: If two distinct product rows are visible in the cart table
Terminate: Both products confirmed in cart

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, open the Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket product page, add it to the cart from that page, go back to the products list, open the shopping cart, click checkout, and fill in first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in to the application with provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with data-test='username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with data-test='username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with data-test='password'
Click the button with data-test='login-button'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Locate and open the Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket product page.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a div with class 'inventory_list' is visible
actions: Click the link with data-test='item-sauce-labs-fleece-jacket-link'

workflow.name: On Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket Product Page
workflow.description: Add the Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket to the cart and return to the products list.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory-item.html?id=5
If a button with data-test='add-to-cart-sauce-labs-fleece-jacket' is visible
actions: Click the button with data-test='add-to-cart-sauce-labs-fleece-jacket'
Click the button with data-test='back-to-products'

workflow.name: On Products Page After Adding Item
workflow.description: Open the shopping cart after adding an item.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If an element with class 'shopping_cart_link' and text '1' is visible
actions: Click the element with class 'shopping_cart_link'

workflow.name: On Shopping Cart Page
workflow.description: Proceed to checkout from the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a button with data-test='checkout' is visible
actions: Click the button with data-test='checkout'

workflow.name: On Checkout Information Page
workflow.description: Fill in the first name, last name, and postal code for checkout.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If an input field with data-test='firstName' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input field with data-test='firstName'
Type 'User' into the input field with data-test='lastName'
Type '12345' into the input field with data-test='postalCode'

workflow.name: Checkout Information Filled
workflow.description: Confirm that the checkout information has been successfully entered.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If an input field with data-test='firstName' has value 'Test'
If an input field with data-test='lastName' has value 'User'
If an input field with data-test='postalCode' has value '12345'

state_names: On Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket Product Page
On Products Page After Adding Item

lint_issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.
Last state's actions don't mention 'Terminate'. NetGent's web agent needs an explicit terminate instruction to stop cleanly.
